Name: NSSM Windows Service - Create
Description:
Create Windows Service using NSSM and powershell script. 

Visit https://nssm.cc/usage for more information.

NOTE: This site may be blocked due to .cc domain

Parameters.Name: ServiceStopStepAdded
Parameters.Label: Step to stop service added as first step?
Parameters.HelpText: Ensure that a step to stop the service added as first step

Parameters.Name: StartupTypeValue
Parameters.Label: StartupType
Parameters.HelpText: StartupType (check https://nssm.cc/usage for the Valid values)

Parameters.Name: ServiceExecutableValue
Parameters.Label: Service Executable
Parameters.HelpText: [Required] Path of the executable to run as Windows Service

Parameters.Name: serviceExecutableArgsValue
Parameters.Label: Service Executable Arguments
Parameters.HelpText: Any arguments to be passed to Service Executable

Parameters.Name: ServiceAppDirectoryValue
Parameters.Label: Service App Directory
Parameters.HelpText: [Required] Directory path of the Service Executable

Parameters.Name: serviceUserAccountValue
Parameters.Label: Service User Account
Parameters.HelpText: [Required] User Account to run Service as.

Parameters.Name: serviceUserPasswordValue
Parameters.Label: Service User Password
Parameters.HelpText: [Required] Password for the User Account to run service as.

Parameters.Name: DependsOnValue
Parameters.Label: Depends On
Parameters.HelpText:
Any services or service groups which must be started before the the service can run.
(check https://nssm.cc/usage for more info)

Parameters.Name: serviceErrorLogFileValue
Parameters.Label: Service Error Log File
Parameters.HelpText: Capture error log messages generated by the application

Parameters.Name: serviceOutputLogFileValue
Parameters.Label: Service Output Log File
Parameters.HelpText: Capture output log messages generated by the application

Parameters.Name: NSSMExecutableValue
Parameters.Label: NSSM Executable
Parameters.HelpText: Allows you to override the NSSM.exe installation location.
